site.title: Setlhopha sa Boditšhabatšhaba sa Tiro ya go Dira Gore Batho ba Bonwe
site.tagline: Go Tswa mo go Tlhokegeng ga Gore Batho ba Kgone go Tsena mo Di-repo Tsa Setšhaba
nav.label: Selo sa konokono
nav.languageNoMatch: Ga go na sepe se se tsamaisanang le sone
skip.toContent: Tsena mo tse di mo teng
hero.home.eyebrow: Go Fitlhelela Motswedi o o Bulegileng
meta.home.description: IATF e fetola ditlhokego tsa mmatota tsa gore go nne le didirisiwa tse di kgonang go bonwa ke batho botlhe.
meta.projects.description: Leba diporojeke tsa go fitlhelela batho botlhe tse di gatisitsweng ka IATF.
meta.propose.description: Kopa porojeke ya go fitlhelela go tswa go IATF ka web, email, kgotsa Discord.
meta.governance.description: Bala kafa IATF e amogelang diporojeke ka teng, e tsamaisang diakhaefe, le go dira gore tiro e nne mo pepeneneng.
meta.join.description: Ditsela tsa go tsaya karolo mo IATF: go tsenya letsogo mo khoding, go ranola, go leka, kgotsa go tlhokomela porojeke.
meta.accessibility.description: IATF e ikaelela go dira jang gore website eno e nne e fitlhelega le gore o ka bega jang fa go na le sengwe se se kgoreletsang gore e fitlhelege.
meta.transparency.description: Direkoto tse di mo pepeneneng tsa IATF: ditshwetso, diporojeke le ditlhabololo di nna di bulegile ka tlwaelo.
actions.emailProjects: Romela diporojeke ka imeili go inbox
registry.empty.title: Ga go ise go gatisiwe diporojeke
registry.empty.body: IATF e baakanyetsa setlhopha sa yone sa ntlha sa diporojeke tsa setšhaba.
proposal.form.title: Romela kopo
proposal.form.body: Tlatsa foromo e e fa tlase fano go romela kopo kwa IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript e a tlhokega go dirisa foromo eno ya web. Fa e le gore ga e teng, dirisa imeile kgotsa Discord mo boemong jwa yone.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Go romela melaetsa ka tlhamalalo ga go a rulaganngwa mo tikologong eno. Foromo eno e tla bula email client ya gago go na le moo.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Go baakanyetsa go romelwa ka pabalesego...
proposal.form.ready: Fa o romela kopo, IATF e tla dira rekoto ya go amogela.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Tsweetswee tlatsa tshekatsheko ya tshireletso ya spam pele o e romela.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Tshireletso ya Spam e fedile. Tsweetswee tlatsa tlhatlhobo gape pele o romela.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Tshireletso ya Spam ga e kgone go tlhomamisiwa jaanong. Tsweetswee leka gape.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Tshireletso ya Spam e fedile. Tsweetswee leka go tlhola gape.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Tsweetswee tlatsa dikarolo tse di tlhokegang pele o di romela.
proposal.form.success: Re amogetse kopo ya gago mme re e boloketse gore re e sekaseke.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Fa o ikgolaganya le IATF gape malebana le kopo eno, akaretsa tshedimosetso e e fa tlase fano.
proposal.form.successLinkLabel: Rekoto e e butsweng ya go amogela
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Go nnile le phoso fa o ne o romela kopo. Tsweetswee leka gape. Fa bothata bo tswelela, dirisa imeili go na le moo.
project.detail.eyebrow: Go tsena mo porojekeng ya setšhaba
project.detail.problemTitle: Porojeke eno e rarabolola bothata bofe?
project.detail.whyTitle: Lebaka la go bo porojeke eno e le teng
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Motswedi wa Seesemane fela, dithanolo di ka nna tsa tsenngwa moragonyana
footer.label: Karolo e e kwa tlase ya tsebe
footer.howToContribute: Kafa o ka ntshang moneelo ka gone
footer.blurb: Go tshwanetse ga nna motlhofo go simolola tiro ya go dira gore batho ba nne le tshedimosetso e e motlhofo, go e gatisa le go e boloka e butswe.
footer.source: Referense ya ditekanyetso tsa go kgona go fitlhelelwa: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Tlwaelo e e kaelwang ke badirisi ba thekenoloji e e thusang.
footer.contactLabel: Tsela ya go Ikgolaganya le Bone
contact.label: Tsela ya go Ikgolaganya le Bone
translation.label: Seemo sa thanolo
translation.source: Seesemane ke puo ya konokono ya tsebe eno.
translation.humanReviewed: Thanolo eno e ile ya sekasekiwa ke sebui se se buang puo eo sentle.
translation.machineAssisted: Thanolo eno e dirilwe ka thuso ya metšhini mme ga e ise e sekasekwe ka botlalo ke sebui se se buang ka thelelo. Dikakantsho di amogelesegile ka GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: Thanolo eno e ne ya tokafadiwa pele ga kgatiso ya bosheng ya Seesemane e tlhabololwa mme e ka nna ya tlhoka go baakanngwa.
translation.report: Go bega bothata jwa thanolo: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Go siame .
